message:
🐛 Fix circuit breaker bypass for services, deployments, nodes, pods

Update useServices, useDeployments, useNodes, and usePods hooks to use
direct fetch() instead of api.get() to bypass the global circuit breaker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
